raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, I charged {$4000.00} on my Citi credit card for a deposit towards the purchase and installation of XXXX automated blinds for my XXXX patio doors for my house in XXXX XXXX, New Mexico. I cancelled this order with the merchant on XX/XX/year> when i discovered that he had falsely created an invoice for the patio doors that were to be installed before the blinds. He never supplied the blinds nor did he install them. 

I informed Citi of this and went through a long process where they were attempting to contact the merchant. Apparently after many months, the only information that Citi supplied me with was a notice showing the amount of {$4000.00} that the merchant received on my credit card account. Strangely, Citi approved the money that the merchant received for my patio doors, but indicated they were not approving the {$4000.00} for the blinds.
